user.title: Add lease vehicle
user.description: Set up a lease vehicle. The integration creates several sensors for mileage projection and estimated excess mileage fees.

data_description.lease_start: Start date of the lease contract.
data_description.lease_end: End date of the lease contract.
data_description.odometer_entity: Sensor or input_number that provides the current vehicle odometer in km.
data_description.start_odometer: Odometer value at lease start. Usually 0 for a new car.
data_description.included_km: Total included mileage for the lease period, for example 32500.
data_description.excess_cost: Price per excess kilometer in euros, for example 0.10.

error.lease_end_before_start: The lease end must be after the lease start.
error.included_km_required: The included lease mileage must be greater than 0.

abort.already_configured: This lease vehicle is already configured.

init.title: Edit lease vehicle
init.description: Adjust the data for this lease vehicle.

data_description.lease_start: Start date of the lease contract.
data_description.lease_end: End date of the lease contract.
data_description.odometer_entity: Sensor or input_number that provides the current vehicle odometer in km.
data_description.start_odometer: Odometer value at lease start. Usually 0 for a new car.
data_description.included_km: Total included mileage for the lease period, for example 32500.
data_description.excess_cost: Price per excess kilometer in euros, for example 0.10.

error.lease_end_before_start: The lease end must be after the lease start.
error.included_km_required: The included lease mileage must be greater than 0.
